records.question: Which festivals named Flower Awards took place in 2007 in the United States with Charles Coody as chair, had at least 155 attendees, and won nominations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.num_of_audience >= 155 AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND nomination.result = 'Won' AND festival_detail.year = 2007 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Festival_ID FROM festival_detail AS T1 WHERE T1.Num_of_Audience >= 155 AND T1.Location = 'United States' AND T1.Year = 2007 AND T1.Chair_Name = 'Charles Coody' AND T1.Festival_Name = 'Flower Awards' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nomination AS T2 WHERE T2.Festival_ID = T1.Festival_ID AND T2.Result = 'Won' )

records.question: Which festivals named Flower Awards in the United States, chaired by Charles Coody, had at most 155 attendees and featured the nominated Program Music/Variety Show Indonesian Idol?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE nomination.result = 'Nominated' AND artwork.type = 'Program Music/Variety Show' AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND artwork.name = 'Indonesian Idol' AND festival_detail.num_of_audience <= 155 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Festival_ID FROM festival_detail AS T1 INNER JOIN nomination AS T2 ON T1.Festival_ID = T2.Festival_ID INNER JOIN artwork AS T3 ON T2.Artwork_ID = T3.Artwork_ID WHERE T1.Location = 'United States' AND T1.Num_of_Audience <= 155 AND T1.Chair_Name = 'Charles Coody' AND T1.Festival_Name = 'Flower Awards' AND T2.Result = 'Nominated' AND T3.Type = 'Program Music/Variety Show' AND T3.Name = 'Indonesian Idol'

records.question: Which festivals have nominations that won?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE nomination.result = 'Won'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Festival_ID FROM festival_detail AS T1 INNER JOIN nomination AS T2 ON T1.Festival_ID = T2.Festival_ID INNER JOIN artwork AS T3 ON T2.Artwork_ID = T3.Artwork_ID WHERE T2.Result = 'Won'

records.question: Which festivals held in the United States since 2007 had Doug Ford as chair and attracted at least 160 audience members?

WHERE festival_detail.year >= 2007 AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Doug Ford' AND festival_detail.num_of_audience >= 160

records.question: What festivals have been chaired by Lucy Lu since 2010 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
WHERE festival_detail.year >= 2010 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Lucy Lu'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Festival_ID FROM festival_detail WHERE Year >= 2010 AND Chair_Name = 'Lucy Lu'

records.question: What festivals held in the United States took place in 2006 or earlier and had nominations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.year <= 2006 AND festival_detail.location = 'United States'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Festival_ID FROM festival_detail AS T1 INNER JOIN nomination AS T2 ON T1.Festival_ID = T2.Festival_ID WHERE T1.Year <= 2006 AND T1.Location = 'United States' GROUP BY T1.Festival_ID
